text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much I train my body, I can't train
my feelings...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, I can't keep making excuses for myself. I need
to accept my own weakness!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep training! Don't try to stop me,
Trainer!
choice_data_list: We should take this slow and steady.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep training! Don't try to stop me,
Trainer!
choice_data_list: We should take this slow and steady.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're probably right... I need to cool my head.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'll do as you say, so keep guiding me
toward victory!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to slack off or compromise! My next
race will be one without any regrets!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Also, how are you just as fired up as me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Well, good. I'm glad we're both serious
about this!
